subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! All three of you are remembered and renowned in this gathering of the All-Merciful. Raise the call of "'Ali!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی هر سه در این انجمن رحمانی مذکورید و مشهور ناد علی تازه بناد
subcodes.subjects: @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @stories; anecdotes, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
